article.title: Software Engineer in Prague, Prague, Czech Republic | Software Engineering at Microsoft

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | Design Systems, UI Platforms & Developer Experience @ Microsoft

posts.text:
🚀 We're hiring! Join us at the cutting edge of intelligent UX — where AI meets modern web development.

The Fluent Hub team in the Office Product Group is expanding! We're looking for a Software Engineer to help shape the future of Fluent UI React v9, the component library behind Microsoft 365 experiences like Office, Teams, Outlook, and Copilot.

But that’s just the beginning.

We're building out a GenUI platform that leverages LLMs to make Fluent UI smarter and more adaptive. At the heart of this is our evolving design system knowledge base — a unified source of truth that helps engineers, designers, and PMs generate code, explore Fluent capabilities, and create intelligent user interfaces with greater confidence and speed.

🔍 What you’ll work on:
- Evolving our LLM-powered Fluent knowledge base into a cross domain unified source of truth.
- Designing model evaluation pipelines and exploring generative UX opportunities.
- Contributing to React components used across M365.
- Collaborating across disciplines in a culture that values inclusion, growth, and innovation.

📍 Based in Prague, in the Czech Republic with flexible work-from-home options.

If you're passionate about AI, React, and redefining how we build user interfaces — we’d love to hear from you.

Apply here 👉 : https://lnkd.in/eBgVezyD 

#Microsoft #Prague #FluentUI #React #GenUI #AI #UX #SoftwareEngineering #Hiring #LLM

author.occupation: Senior Director of Engineering – People.ai

resharedPost.text:
I’m thrilled to share that People.ai today announced $100 million in Series D #funding at a $1.1 billion post-money valuation. 🎉
 
This series was co-led by Mike Dinsdale, CFA Dinsdale of Akkadian Ventures and Abdulla AlBanna of Mubadala Capital, with participation from existing investors including ICONIQ Capital and Lightspeed Venture Partners.
 
Five years into our journey, I’m proud to say that we’ve built the industry’s premiere SmartData platform to power the world’s best sales account and opportunity management. 🔌💰

I’ve shared some additional thoughts about the road People.ai has traveled and where we’re heading in my latest blog post:
https://bit.ly/37yxoqN

Thank you to the entire People.ai team, past and present, that helped us get to this point. I also want to express appreciation to the Legendary CMOs and CROs who have been so generous in sharing their wisdom on our Legends of Sales and Marketing podcast. And most importantly, thank you to all People.ai customers. You have my commitment that People.ai will continue to put your needs first as we deliver innovative solutions that drive meaningful business impact. 

P.S. There’s no better way to get to know what we’ve been up to than to download PeopleGlass.app.  It’s a modern spreadsheet-like CRM interface that you’ll love. Best of all, it’s free and it will save you at least 5 hours per week of Salesforce data entry. :)
